title: Supabase Advisor Access Recovery And Execution-Gate Decision
objective: Recover a truthful Supabase management and advisor path for the `09` Operations Visibility schema tranche from the current session and decide whether the tranche can proceed to bounded live execution under that restored gate.
dependency_note: Packet 045 closed the repo-side public-view security issue but still treated the `09` tranche as blocked because advisor access appeared unavailable from this session.
recovery_steps: Activate the correct Supabase project, branch, and organization management surfaces for this session.
Verify the target project can be reached through the Supabase MCP management path.
Retrieve security and performance advisor results for the project.
Decide whether the recovered official advisor path is sufficient to open a bounded live execution packet for the `09` tranche.
constraints: Do not apply the `09` schema tranche in this packet.
Do not mutate runtime services, package manifests, lockfiles, or old-clone state.
Do not overclaim that unrelated legacy advisor debt has been resolved.
execution_rationale: The earlier advisor-access blocker was recoverable from this session once the correct Supabase management tools were activated: project lookup plus security and performance advisor retrieval both succeeded.
The restored official advisor path means the `09` tranche no longer needs an alternate execution gate or speculative management-API recovery before proceeding.
Existing advisor debt still exists elsewhere in the project, but that debt is preexisting legacy surface and no longer prevents a bounded live execution packet for the `09` tranche itself.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 047 - Operations Visibility Schema Tranche Live Execution And Validation
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-06 as the direct follow-on to Packet 045. Packet 046 recovered a truthful Supabase management/advisor path from the current session by activating the correct management surfaces and verifying project lookup plus security/performance advisor retrieval against `resa-power-db`. The `09` tranche is no longer blocked on advisor access and can proceed to a bounded live execution packet.
